Package org.apache.juneau.marshall

Class MarshalledFilter.Builder

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.marshall.MarshalledFilter.Builder
Enclosing class:
MarshalledFilter
public static class MarshalledFilter.Builder extends Object
Builder class.

  • Constructor Details

    • Builder

      protected Builder(ClassInfoTyped<?> beanClass)
      Constructor for bean filters.
      Parameters:
      beanClass - The bean class that this filter applies to.

  • Method Details

    • applyAnnotations

      public MarshalledFilter.Builder applyAnnotations(List<Marshalled> annotations)
      Applies the information in the specified list of @Marshalled annotations to this filter.
      Parameters:
      annotations - The annotations to apply.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • applyBeanTypeAnnotations

      public MarshalledFilter.Builder applyBeanTypeAnnotations(List<BeanType> annotations)
      Applies the information in the specified list of @BeanType annotations to this filter.

      Carries the bean-modeling attributes (property lists, ordering, fluent setters, stop class, etc.) that used to live on @Marshalled before the bean-layer split.

      Parameters:
      annotations - The annotations to apply.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • build

      public MarshalledFilter build()
      Creates a MarshalledFilter with settings in this builder class.
      Returns:
      A new MarshalledFilter instance.

    • dictionary

      public MarshalledFilter.Builder dictionary(Class<?>... values)
      Bean dictionary.

      Adds to the list of classes that make up the bean dictionary for this bean.

      See Also:
      • Marshalled.dictionary()
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.beanDictionary(Class...)
      Parameters:
      values - The values to add to this property.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • dictionary

      public MarshalledFilter.Builder dictionary(ClassInfo... values)
      Bean dictionary.

      Same as the other dictionary method but accepts ClassInfo objects directly instead of Class objects.

      Parameters:
      values - The class info objects to add to this property.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • example

      public MarshalledFilter.Builder example(String value)
      Example.
      Parameters:
      value - The new value for this property.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • excludeProperties

      public MarshalledFilter.Builder excludeProperties(String... value)
      Bean property excludes.

      Specifies properties to exclude from the bean class.

      See Also:
      • BeanType.excludeProperties()
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.beanPropertiesExcludes(Class, String)
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.beanPropertiesExcludes(String, String)
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.beanPropertiesExcludes(Map)
      Parameters:
      value - The new value for this setting.
      Values can contain comma-delimited list of property names.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • findFluentSetters

      public MarshalledFilter.Builder findFluentSetters()
      Find fluent setters.

      When enabled, fluent setters are detected on beans.

      See Also:
      • BeanType.findFluentSetters()
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.findFluentSetters()
      Returns:
      This object.

    • implClass

      public MarshalledFilter.Builder implClass(Class<?> value)
      Bean implementation class.
      Parameters:
      value - The new value for this setting.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • implClass

      public MarshalledFilter.Builder implClass(ClassInfo value)
      Implementation class.

      Same as the other implClass method but accepts a ClassInfo object directly instead of a Class object.

      Parameters:
      value - The new value for this setting.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • interceptor

      public MarshalledFilter.Builder interceptor(Class<?> value)
      Bean interceptor.

      The interceptor to use for intercepting and altering getter and setter calls.

      See Also:
      • Marshalled.interceptor()
      • BeanInterceptor
      Parameters:
      value - The new value for this setting.
      The default value is BeanInterceptor.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • interceptor

      public MarshalledFilter.Builder interceptor(ClassInfo value)
      Bean interceptor.

      Same as the other interceptor method but accepts a ClassInfo object directly instead of a Class object.

      Parameters:
      value - The new value for this setting.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • interfaceClass

      public MarshalledFilter.Builder interfaceClass(Class<?> value)
      Bean interface class.

      Identifies a class to be used as the interface class for this and all subclasses. When specified, only the list of properties defined on the interface class will be used during serialization.

      See Also:
      • BeanType.interfaceClass()
      Parameters:
      value - The new value for this setting.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • interfaceClass

      public MarshalledFilter.Builder interfaceClass(ClassInfo value)
      Interface class.

      Same as the other interfaceClass method but accepts a ClassInfo object directly instead of a Class object.

      Parameters:
      value - The new value for this setting.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • properties

      public MarshalledFilter.Builder properties(String... value)
      Bean property includes.

      Specifies the set and order of names of properties associated with the bean class.

      See Also:
      • BeanType.properties()
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.beanProperties(Class, String)
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.beanProperties(String, String)
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.beanProperties(Map)
      Parameters:
      value - The new value for this setting.
      Values can contain comma-delimited list of property names.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • propertyNamer

      public MarshalledFilter.Builder propertyNamer(Class<? extends PropertyNamer> value)
      Bean property namer.

      The class to use for calculating bean property names.

      See Also:
      • BeanType.propertyNamer()
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.propertyNamer(Class)
      • PropertyNamer
      Parameters:
      value - The new value for this setting.
      The default is BasicPropertyNamer.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • propertyNamer

      public MarshalledFilter.Builder propertyNamer(ClassInfoTyped<? extends PropertyNamer> value)
      Bean property namer.

      Same as the other propertyNamer method but accepts a ClassInfoTyped object directly instead of a Class object.

      Parameters:
      value - The new value for this setting.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • readOnlyProperties

      public MarshalledFilter.Builder readOnlyProperties(String... value)
      Read-only bean properties.

      Specifies one or more properties on a bean that are read-only despite having valid getters.

      See Also:
      • BeanType.readOnlyProperties()
      • BeanProp.ro()
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.beanPropertiesReadOnly(Class, String)
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.beanPropertiesReadOnly(String, String)
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.beanPropertiesReadOnly(Map)
      Parameters:
      value - The new value for this setting.
      Values can contain comma-delimited list of property names.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • unsortedProperties

      public MarshalledFilter.Builder unsortedProperties()
      Opt out of alphabetical property sorting for this specific bean.
      See Also:
      • BeanType.unsorted()
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.unsortedProperties()
      Returns:
      This object.

    • unsortedProperties

      public MarshalledFilter.Builder unsortedProperties(boolean value)
      Opt out of alphabetical property sorting for this specific bean.
      See Also:
      • BeanType.unsorted()
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.unsortedProperties()
      Parameters:
      value - The new value for this property.
      The default is false.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • stopClass

      public MarshalledFilter.Builder stopClass(Class<?> value)
      Bean stop class.

      Identifies a stop class for this class and all subclasses. Identical in purpose to the stop class specified by Introspector.getBeanInfo(Class, Class).

      See Also:
      • BeanType.stopClass()
      Parameters:
      value - The new value for this setting.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • stopClass

      public MarshalledFilter.Builder stopClass(ClassInfo value)
      Stop class.

      Same as the other stopClass method but accepts a ClassInfo object directly instead of a Class object.

      Parameters:
      value - The new value for this setting.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • typeName

      public MarshalledFilter.Builder typeName(String value)
      Bean dictionary type name.

      Specifies the dictionary type name for this bean.

      See Also:
      • Marshalled.typeName()
      Parameters:
      value - The new value for this setting.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • writeOnlyProperties

      public MarshalledFilter.Builder writeOnlyProperties(String... value)
      Write-only bean properties.

      Specifies one or more properties on a bean that are write-only despite having valid setters.

      See Also:
      • BeanType.writeOnlyProperties()
      • BeanProp.wo()
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.beanPropertiesWriteOnly(Class, String)
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.beanPropertiesWriteOnly(String, String)
      • MarshallingContext.Builder.beanPropertiesWriteOnly(Map)
      Parameters:
      value - The new value for this setting.
      Values can contain comma-delimited list of property names.
      Returns:
      This object.
